name: Magellan Financial Group Limited
analysis: MFG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$9.8200, stop A$8.7714, target A$11.5500 (1.65:1) — then trail it.
